description:
You are a Sustainability Consultant evaluating a cool roof retrofit. The Energy3D project 'building-shape.ng3' is open. Perform the following steps:
1. Change the geographic location of the project to Phoenix, AZ to model a hot climate.
2. Run an Annual Energy Analysis to determine the baseline annual cooling energy required for the building.
3. Select all roof structures and change their Albedo property to 0.85 (representing a highly reflective white cool roof).
4. Re-run the Annual Energy Analysis to determine the optimized annual cooling energy.
5. Save the modified building model to ~/Documents/Energy3D/cool_roof_optimized.ng3
6. Create a text file at ~/Documents/Energy3D/cooling_savings.txt that explicitly reports three values (in kWh): the Baseline Cooling Load, the Optimized Cooling Load, and the Total Cooling Savings (Baseline minus Optimized).
